_about: Every credential the platform runs on, with its expiry. THE single place expiry lives — preflight (loadkit/preflight.py pat_expiry_check) and scripts/check_keys.py read this. When you rotate a key, update its row HERE in the same sitting. 'expires: null' = no expiry tracked (verify at the provider if it starts failing).

keys.name: Snowflake PAT (ACCOUNTADMIN, the one credential everything writes through)
keys.renew_note: Decoded from the live token's JWT exp claim (zero-network). Rotate in Snowsight: Admin > Users > CROGG23 > Programmatic access tokens > generate new; paste into library-onboarding/.env SNOWFLAKE_PAT; update this row. check_keys.py cross-checks this date against the live token and flags drift.

keys.name: SAM.gov entity-extract API key
keys.renew_note: SAM.gov keys live ~90 days from issue (issued ~2026-06-24). Regenerate at sam.gov > Account Details > API Key; update .env + this row.

keys.name: Anthropic API key (recon/codegen LLM path)
keys.renew_note: No expiry — Anthropic keys live until revoked at console.anthropic.com. Watch spend limits instead.

keys.name: SEC/FFIEC contact User-Agent (not a secret, but a load fails without it)
keys.renew_note: no expiry tracked — must contain a real email; SEC returns 403 without it.

keys.name: Census ACS API key
keys.renew_note: no expiry tracked — Census keys don't expire; re-request at api.census.gov/data/key_signup.html if revoked.

keys.name: CourtListener / RECAP token
keys.renew_note: no expiry tracked — manage at courtlistener.com profile > API token.

keys.name: Socrata app token (portal rate limits)
keys.renew_note: no expiry tracked — manage at the Socrata developer portal; only affects rate limits.
